description: Full export with all spokes — produces manifest with 10 or fewer knowledge files and system instruction

expected.knowledge_files: array with brand-engine.md and voice-engine.md as standalone entries

prohibit: brand-engine.md or voice-engine.md merged into a combined file

description: Focused export with 2 spokes — prioritizes those spokes, brand and voice always present

expected.knowledge_files: includes brand-engine.md, voice-engine.md, and files relevant to seo-keywords and video-development
expected.total_files: between 4 and 10 (brand + voice + focused spoke files)

prohibit: knowledge_files including unrelated spoke SKILL.md files when focused spokes specified

description: Non-existent spoke requested — warning emitted, remaining spokes processed normally

expected.warnings: contains note about nonexistent-spoke not found
expected.knowledge_files: includes files for seo-keywords but not nonexistent-spoke

prohibit: atom failure or crash due to missing spoke
